title: Jaffa Factory 2
description: The official modpack for used for the Jaffa Factory 2 YouTube series
body:
![Jaffa Factory 2 Logo](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/6602e3868144b8486d855d7b/072752b0-36e3-4664-ae55-d83899fd1c05/jaffafactory2logo.png)
**Jaffa Factory 2** is a **1.20.1** Forge modpack all about automating the production of Jaffa Cakes.

- Use Create to harvest crops, refine materials, and transport goods all in the effort to build a completely automatic Jaffa Cake factory.
- Explore new lands with Terralith, Alex's Mobs and much more. Find new structures, mobs and biomes in which you can build your factory.
- Take your Jaffa Cake empire to the stars with Ad Astra, featuring custom crafting recipies to add some Jaffa Cake flair to the space race.

A huge thank you to **Zalgen** and **Jack** for the amazing [Jaffabricate](https://modrinth.com/mod/jaffabricate) mod that inspired the Jaffa Factory 2 YouTube series and modpack.

This modpack was designed for the Jaffa Factory 2 and Jaffa Quest 2 YouTube series. If you want to play along with the series be sure to use this seed: **568179354584579483** 

_Please note that there are slight differences between the modpack played on the Jaffa Factory 2 YouTube series and this one as some mods are not available on Modrinth. Most notably FTB Ultimine is missing. If you wish to play with these mods you will need to download them manually._

**Watch the series:**
